title: GZLZ
description: Modpack to enter the No.6 association minecraft server. 六中神人会服务器客户端整合包
body:
# English

This package is designed to help newcomers quickly join the server without having to worry about mods, mod loaders, and game versions
The integration package automatically adds the entry method of the six servers, so there is no need to add it manually

The integration package comes pre-installed with Sodium, its extensions, and Iris, and supports loading light and shadow
Information display mods such as apple peel and jade are also installed
Bobby cache server blocks are pre-installed to increase render distance
Full list of mods at [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/gzlz/version/1.0.0)

At present, the original version 1.21.6 and above can still join the server, if you are familiar with the installation of mods and have your own mods and configurations can not use this integrated package,
But installing Bobby is highly recommended to improve the server experience

# Chinese
## 加入六中神人会(?)的最佳方式
![服务器内的三大护法](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0175ac54397f4cc5aaf7380d200ec53d0f9d993f.jpeg)
此整合包目的是帮助新手快速加入服务器，而无须纠结于mod，mod loader，和游戏版本
整合包自动添加了六中服务器的进入方式，无须手动添加

整合包预装了Sodium及其拓展和Iris，支持加载光影
还安装了苹果皮和玉等信息显示类mod
预装了Bobby缓存服务器区块以提高渲染距离
完整mod列表在[这里](https://modrinth.com/modpack/gzlz/version/1.0.0)

目前原版1.21.6及以上仍然可以加入服务器，如果你熟悉mod的安装并且有自己的mod和配置可以不使用此整合包，
但是强烈推荐安装Bobby以改善服务器体验
